create.title: Schedule a Meeting
create.subtitle: Find the best time for your group to meet

batchModal.description: Create slots for all dates between start and end dates.

created.title: Poll Created!
created.subtitle: Share the link with your group
created.organizerLinkDescription: Save this link — it lets you edit and confirm the final time
created.organizerLinkWarning: This link is private. Keep it safe — there's no recovery if lost.

vote.noResponses: No responses yet. Be the first!

organizer.confirmDialogMessage: Confirm {{date}} as the meeting time? This will be visible to everyone.

myPolls.title: Find Our Time
myPolls.subtitle: Create a poll and share it with your group
myPolls.noPolls: You haven't created any polls yet.
myPolls.loginPrompt: Log in to save your polls to your profile
myPolls.loginBenefit: Logged-in users can access their organizer links from any device.

errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to access this poll
errors.alreadyConfirmed: This poll has already been confirmed
errors.cannotRemoveVotedOptions: Cannot remove time options that have votes
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
